_comment: BAUER GROUP NATS - example declarative topology. Full field reference: docs/messaging-topology.md. Copy to config/nats-topology.json, edit, and mount it. ${VAR} placeholders resolve from the nats-init environment (missing var = hard error). Keys starting with _ are comments. Processed idempotently on every start; additive only (never deletes). Durations are NANOSECONDS (JetStream wire format): 1s=1000000000, 1m=60000000000, 1h=3600000000000, 1d=86400000000000.
_streams_note: A stream captures a set of subjects. num_replicas: 3 needs the 3-node cluster (R3 tolerates 1 node down). retention: limits | interest | workqueue. storage: file | memory. discard: old | new. Set max_bytes/max_msgs/max_age to bound growth.
_kv_note: Key/Value buckets are JetStream streams under the hood. history = revisions kept per key. ttl is a Go duration string ('24h', '0s'); 0s = no expiry.
_object_stores_note: Object stores chunk large blobs across JetStream. Prefer them (or external object storage like MinIO) over oversized messages.
_consumers_note: Durable consumers track delivery on a stream. ack_policy: explicit | none | all. deliver_policy: all | last | new | by_start_sequence | by_start_time. ack_wait is NANOSECONDS. filter_subject narrows the stream subjects this consumer receives.
